note: Advisory sandbox build. CI-1 is a REPORT-ONLY pr-governance-lint: a Python parser that, given a PR body string, asserts the governance-required fields from .github/pull_request_template.md are present (lane + receipt_id filled, both required checkboxes checked) and prints a JSON report, plus a pull_request-only, non-blocking workflow YAML PROPOSAL that runs it over the PR body and posts findings to the job summary. Never a bare governance PASS.
title: Report-only PR governance lint (required-field / required-checkbox parser + non-blocking pull_request workflow proposal)

ground.note: read-only ground truth; the lint enforces the template's structured fields (lane/motor_id_or_human_gate/receipt_id + the two non-duplication checkboxes).

deliverables.reconcile_target: .github/workflows/pr-governance-lint.yml (on founder approval; NOT written by this build)

what_it_proves: the parser lints the VALID sample PR body (lane=sg_governance filled, receipt_id filled, both required checkboxes [x]) to ok=True with missing==[]

MUTATION teeth: reverting exactly the receipt_id line back to its template placeholder <!-- ... --> flips ok=False with missing==['receipt_id']; a placeholder HTML comment counts as UNFILLED, never satisfied
second independent teeth: unchecking the non-duplication box flips ok=False with missing containing checkbox:non_duplication
REPORT-ONLY / NON-BLOCKING: the script ALWAYS exits 0; the pass/fail signal lives in the JSON report's ok field, so the CI job is advisory and never blocks a merge

CI GUARDS asserted against the YAML proposal: permissions == {contents: read} only (no write scope in executable yaml); on: pull_request ONLY (never pull_request_target/push/schedule/workflow_dispatch); NO secrets: refs and no credential env keys (only PR_BODY = github.event.pull_request.body); job continue-on-error (non-blocking) and invokes the parser in report-only mode (no --write-supabase/--write-receipt/--fail-on-block-merge); findings posted to GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
RED-CAPABLE: the canary asserts the receipt-less body PASSES the lint (ok True) and correctly FIRES (AssertionError, exit 1)
locks_respected: authored the GitHub Actions YAML as a PROPOSAL in the build dir; did NOT write into .github/workflows/
append-only: edited no tracked file; touched no existing workflow (brain-loop-autorun-v1.yml et al. untouched)
no live call (no network/secrets/HOME=temp respected); no git write commands; no core.hooksPath
did not read/stage/depend on other lanes' files or the untracked drops (graph-out/, receipts/l0-*, scripts/*repo_graph*)

results.red_run_canary: FIRED (asserting the receipt-less body reads ok=True raised AssertionError, exit 1)
results.pollution_outside_build_dir: none (git status --porcelain tracked changes outside CI-1 == 0)

exit_gate_B4: CI-1 done - report-only pr-governance-lint parser + non-blocking pull_request workflow proposal; the parser reads the template's required fields/checkboxes from data (placeholder == unfilled) with a minimal-mutation flip, and the test asserts every mandated CI guard (contents:read, pull_request-only, no secrets/env, non-blocking, report-only). Canary has teeth.
next_action: on founder approval, reconcile pr-governance-lint.yml to .github/workflows/; optionally extend the parser to lint lane values against data/github_automation_registry_v1.json task_cell_owners.
